LanguageData.VFEE_Artist.label: the artist
LanguageData.VFEE_Chef.label: the chef
LanguageData.VFEE_ChildOf.description: Opinion of {PARENT_labelShort} about {PAWN_labelShort} is locked at 100. Opinion of {PAWN_labelShort} about {PARENT_labelShort} is locked at 100.
LanguageData.VFEE_ChildOf.label: {CHILD} of {parent_labelshort}
LanguageData.VFEE_Chosen.description: +10 Opinion from every pawn of {FACTION_name}. +10 Opinion about every pawn of {FACTION_name}.
LanguageData.VFEE_Chosen.label: chosen of {faction_name}
LanguageData.VFEE_Craftsman.label: the craftsman
LanguageData.VFEE_Destroyer.description: +10% Trade Price Improvement with Enemies of {FACTION_name}.
LanguageData.VFEE_Destroyer.label: destroyer of {faction_name}
LanguageData.VFEE_FirstOfName.description: Every noble person has +5 opinion of this pawn.
LanguageData.VFEE_FirstOfName.label: first of {pawn_possessive} name
LanguageData.VFEE_Gardener.label: the gardener
LanguageData.VFEE_Healer.label: the healer
LanguageData.VFEE_Intellectual.label: the intellectual
LanguageData.VFEE_LordOf.description: +1 Honor every 5 days when {PAWN_pronoun} is in {SETTLEMENT_label}.
LanguageData.VFEE_LordOf.label: {RANK} of {settlement_label}
LanguageData.VFEE_Marksman.label: the marksman
LanguageData.VFEE_Miner.label: the miner
LanguageData.VFEE_Negotiator.label: the negotiator
LanguageData.VFEE_PatronOfArts.label: patron of arts
LanguageData.VFEE_Rancher.label: the rancher
LanguageData.VFEE_RulerOf.description: Tithe collection speed of {SETTLEMENT_label} is doubled.
LanguageData.VFEE_RulerOf.label: ruler of {settlement_label}
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.label: the great
LanguageData.VFEE_Warrior.label: the warrior
LanguageData.VFEE_WieldOfWeapon.description: 50% chance of +1 Honor for every kill with {WEAPON_label}.
